aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Dependable Air LLC due to the lack of structured data and conversational content. Their website is not optimized for AI-driven search experiences.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with structured data for common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with positive reviews, photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Product schema for services offered

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from understanding and citing their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'air conditioning repair in Mesa, AZ' where AI struggles to find detailed service information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating in-depth content and guides on HVAC maintenance and repair to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup, making it invisible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies including schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models recognize and recommend their services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share. Act now to stay competitive.
